data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Time taken to make a decision increases with the number of options.
data.technical_spec: Limited options to simplify user interaction.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Time to acquire a target is a function of the distance to and size of the target.
data.technical_spec: Designed intuitive and reachable user interface elements.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Users perceive aesthetically pleasing designs as easier to use.
data.technical_spec: Incorporated clean and consistent design language.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Humans can maintain 7±2 pieces of information in working memory.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined information presentation to prevent overload.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users spend most of their time on other sites and prefer familiar conventions.
